user.title: Smart Actions
user.description: Set up the Smart Actions integration to manage contextual quick actions on your dashboard.

add_action.title: Add Smart Action
add_action.description: Create a new smart action. Conditions and service calls can be configured in YAML or via the smart_actions.add_action service.

data.name: Display Name
data.users: Allowed users (comma-separated person entity IDs, empty = all)
data.conditions: Condition of whether to show this smart action on the dashboard
data.tap_action: Action to run when the action is clicked on the dashboard
data.icon_tap_action: Action to run when the action icon is clicked on the dashboard
